languages.text:
Пропадет после первого срабатывания в космобою.
When destroying an enemy ship, restores the most damaged shield sector to maximum and gains +2 movement points for the current turn.На первый космобой (потом пропадает).
When destroying an enemy ship, restores the most damaged shield sector to maximum and gains +2 movement points for the current turn.

traits.locale_text:
Пропадет после первого срабатывания в космобою.
When destroying an enemy ship, restores the most damaged shield sector to maximum and gains +2 movement points for the current turn.На первый космобой (потом пропадает).
When destroying an enemy ship, restores the most damaged shield sector to maximum and gains +2 movement points for the current turn.

languages.text: When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.
languages.original_text:
Пропадет после первого срабатывания в космобою.
When destroying an enemy ship, restores the most damaged shield sector to maximum and gains +2 movement points for the current turn.На первый космобой (потом пропадает).
When destroying an enemy ship, restores the most damaged shield sector to maximum and gains +2 movement points for the current turn.

traits.locale_text: This effect is removed after the first activation in combat. Whenever an enemy voidship is destroyed, the flagship gets its most damaged shield sector recovered and gains +2 MP for the current turn.

When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.

When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.

languages.text: Когда в бою впервые уничтожен вражеский пустотный корабль, флагман полностью восстанавливает заряд щита самого поврежденного сектора и получает +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}ОПП{/g} в текущем ходу.
languages.original_text: This effect is removed after the first activation in combat. Whenever an enemy voidship is destroyed, the flagship recovers its most damaged shield sector and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} for the current {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Когда в бою впервые уничтожен вражеский пустотный корабль, флагман полностью восстанавливает заряд щита самого поврежденного сектора и получает +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}ОПП{/g} в текущем ходу.

Когда в бою впервые уничтожен вражеский пустотный корабль, флагман полностью восстанавливает заряд щита самого поврежденного сектора и получает +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}ОПП{/g} в текущем ходу.

languages.text: Dieser Effekt wird nach der ersten Aktivierung im Kampf entfernt. Wird ein feindliches Raumschiff zerstört, regeneriert das Flaggschiff seinen am stärksten beschädigten Schildsektor und erhält +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g} für den aktuellen Zug.
languages.original_text: This effect is removed after the first activation in combat. Whenever an enemy voidship is destroyed, the flagship recovers its most damaged shield sector and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} for the current {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Dieser Effekt wird nach der ersten Aktivierung im Kampf entfernt. Wird ein feindliches Raumschiff zerstört, regeneriert das Flaggschiff seinen am stärksten beschädigten Schildsektor und erhält +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g} für den aktuellen {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g}.

languages.text: Este efecto se elimina tras su primera activación en combate. Cada vez que destruyes una nave del vacío enemiga, la nave insignia recupera su sector de escudo más dañado y obtiene +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PM{/g} en el {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} actual.
languages.original_text: This effect is removed after the first activation in combat. Whenever an enemy voidship is destroyed, the flagship recovers its most damaged shield sector and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} for the current {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Este efecto se elimina tras su primera activación en combate. Cada vez que destruyes una nave del vacío enemiga, la nave insignia recupera su sector de escudo más dañado y obtiene +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PM{/g} en el {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} actual.

languages.text: Bu etki, çatışmada ilk kez etkinleştirildikten sonra ortadan kalkar. Bir düşman uçsuz gemisi imha edildiğinde sancak gemisi, en çok hasar görmüş kalkan sektörünü onarır ve mevcut {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turda{/g} +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}HP{/g} kazanır.
languages.original_text: This effect is removed after the first activation in combat. Whenever an enemy voidship is destroyed, the flagship recovers its most damaged shield sector and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} for the current {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Bu etki, çatışmada ilk kez etkinleştirildikten sonra ortadan kalkar. Bir düşman uçsuz gemisi imha edildiğinde sancak gemisi, en çok hasar görmüş kalkan sektörünü onarır ve mevcut {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turda{/g} +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}HP{/g} kazanır.

languages.text: 战斗中首次生效后，移除此效果。每有一个敌方虚空舰被摧毁时，旗舰受损最严重的护盾区域得到修复，并在当前{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}获得2点{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}移动点数{/g}。
languages.original_text: This effect is removed after the first activation in combat. Whenever an enemy voidship is destroyed, the flagship recovers its most damaged shield sector and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} for the current {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 战斗中首次生效后，移除此效果。每有一个敌方虚空舰被摧毁时，旗舰受损最严重的护盾区域得到修复，并在当前{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}获得2点{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}移动点数{/g}。

languages.text: Cet effet se dissipe après sa première activation au combat. Lorsque le vaisseau spatial d'un ennemi est détruit, le vaisseau amiral répare son secteur de bouclier le plus endommagé et gagne +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} pendant le {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} en cours.
languages.original_text: This effect is removed after the first activation in combat. Whenever an enemy voidship is destroyed, the flagship recovers its most damaged shield sector and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} for the current {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Cet effet se dissipe après sa première activation au combat. Lorsque le vaisseau spatial d'un ennemi est détruit, le vaisseau amiral répare son secteur de bouclier le plus endommagé et gagne +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} pendant le {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} en cours.

languages.text: 敵空母が戦闘で初めて撃破されると、旗艦は最もダメージを受けていた{g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}シールドセクター{/g}を回復し、現在のターンに+2{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g}を得る。
languages.original_text: When an enemy voidship is destroyed for the first time in combat, the flagship recovers its most damaged g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} and gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g} for the current turn.

traits.locale_text: 敵空母が戦闘で初めて撃破されると、旗艦は最もダメージを受けていた{g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}シールドセクター{/g}を回復し、現在のターンに+2{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g}を得る。
